response.step_by_step_log: Identified 'Life Will Change' (Persona 5) performed by Ouro Kronii, and 'X-encounter' (Maon Kurosaki) performed by IRyS via visual OCR and audio recognition. Performed web searches for both songs to confirm details and gather lyrics. Simplified artist names for search queries: 'Life Will Change Persona 5' and 'X-encounter Maon Kurosaki'.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performance by hololive VTubers Ouro Kronii and IRyS, featuring tracks from Persona 5 and Tokyo Ravens.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs 'Life Will Change' from Persona 5. Title and hashtag appear on-screen.
IRyS performs 'X-encounter', the opening theme for the anime Tokyo Ravens. Credits for lyrics and music appear on-screen.
